title: 27-3 CANCELLED Foreign Convention and Tour Incentive Program – Rebate for Eligible Tour Packages and Accommodation Supplied as Part of Eligible Tour Packages - Canada.ca
content:
## 27-3 CANCELLED Foreign Convention and Tour Incentive Program – Rebate for Eligible Tour Packages and Accommodation Supplied as Part of Eligible Tour Packages

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2025-09-11 and is no longer available.
While all Canada Revenue Agency web content is accessible, we also provide our forms and publications in alternate formats (digital audio, electronic text, Braille, and large print) to allow persons with disabilities to access the information they need.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
